title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A planned fight at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in a mass shooting, leaving two dead and several wounded. The NC State Bureau of Investigation is involved.
charlotte_impact: Highlights rising gun violence and its impact on community safety, prompting calls for action and increased security measures.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host the 2026 Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Showcases advancements in polymer technology and Charlotte's role as a hub for industry-specific training and development.

title: Cold Overnight with Patchy Frost Expected
summary: A cold overnight is expected with patchy frost, followed by a warm-up next week.
charlotte_impact: Provides a brief weather update, relevant for local residents planning their activities.

title: SBI Investigates Inmate Death at Mecklenburg County Jail
summary: The SBI is investigating the death of Juan Utuy-Sarat, 41, who was found unresponsive in his cell at Mecklenburg County jail and later died at the hospital.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about inmate safety and conditions within the Mecklenburg County jail system.

title: Convicted Felon Arrested on Murder Charge in York
summary: York police arrested a convicted felon on a murder charge stemming from a deadly shooting on Friday night.
charlotte_impact: Addresses crime and public safety, highlighting the ongoing challenges of repeat offenders and gun violence.

title: Charges Expected in Deadly Iredell County Crash
summary: Investigators believe speed was a factor in a deadly collision in Iredell County, and charges are expected.
charlotte_impact: Serves as a reminder of the dangers of reckless driving and its potential consequences.

title: Crash Closes I-485 Inner in Matthews
summary: Emergency crews responded to a crash on I-485 Inner in Matthews around 5:30 a.m. Saturday, causing road closures.
charlotte_impact: Informs commuters about traffic disruptions and potential delays due to the accident.

title: Teachers Rally in Gaston County for Higher Pay
summary: Hundreds rallied in Dallas, Gaston County, for higher teacher pay, highlighting financial challenges in education, including layoffs.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the critical issue of teacher compensation and its impact on the quality of education in Gaston County.

title: May Day March in Charlotte Advocates for Worker, Immigration Protections
summary: Hundreds marched along Central Avenue in Charlotte for International Workers’ Day, calling for stronger worker protections and immigrant rights.
charlotte_impact: Reflects the community's engagement in social justice issues and advocacy for vulnerable populations.

title: CMPD Chief Prioritizes Officer Wellness, Community Trust
summary: Chief Estella Patterson discusses crime trends, officer wellness, street takeovers, and strengthening public safety in a recent interview.
charlotte_impact: Provides insights into the police department's priorities and strategies for addressing crime and improving community relations.

title: Fake Grenade Prompts Evacuation at Caldwell County Walmart
summary: An "emergency situation" at a Walmart in Hudson, Caldwell County, caused by a man with a fake grenade prompted evacuations and a large police presence.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the potential for disruption and fear caused by hoax threats, requiring significant law enforcement response.

title: Charlotte Water Implements Mandatory Water Restrictions
summary: Charlotte Water implements mandatory water restrictions amid worsening drought conditions in the Carolinas, urging residents to reduce nonessential water use.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the severity of the drought and the need for conservation efforts to protect the region's water supply.

title: Charlotte Protestors Target Duke Energy Over Proposed Rate Increase
summary: Charlotte protestors target Duke Energy over a proposed 18% rate increase, which could raise residential bills by about $28 per month in 2027.
charlotte_impact: Reflects public concern over rising utility costs and their impact on household budgets.

title: Thousands of NC Teachers March for Better Pay, Funding
summary: Thousands of NC teachers march for better pay and increased funding at 'Kids over Corporations' rally, warning of risks to public education.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the ongoing struggle for adequate resources and support for public education in North Carolina.

title: Mecklenburg County Parks Issue Burn Ban Amid Drought
summary: Mecklenburg County Park and Recreation implements a mandatory burn ban across its park system beginning Monday, May 4, due to severe drought conditions.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the impact of drought on recreational activities and the need for fire safety measures.
